tools.name: azure cli
tools.test: az version | jq -er '.["azure-cli"] // error("\"azure cli\" not found")'

tools.name: azure cli telemetry
tools.test: az version | jq -er '.["azure-cli-telemetry"] // error("\"azure cli telemetry\" not found")'

tools.name: azure cli azure-devops extension
tools.test: az extension list | jq -e 'first(.[] | select (.name=="azure-devops") | .version) // error("Extension \"azure-devops\" not found")'
